parts.text:
Find all files in the web/ directory that contain settings UI markup matching these patterns:
1. A bordered card with title/description on the left and a control (toggle/switch/button/etc) on the right — the "SettingRow" pattern
2. Settings section headers with h3 and muted paragraph
3. Radio card groups used in settings

Search in web/src/ for settings-related components and pages. Return the file paths, line numbers, and relevant code snippets for each instance found.

The user wants me to find settings-related UI patterns in the `web/src/` directory. I need to search for:
1. A "SettingRow" pattern - bordered card with title/description on the left and a control on the right
2. Settings section headers with h3 and muted paragraph
3. Radio card groups used in settings

I should start by searching for settings-related files and then examine the code. Let me use glob and grep to find relevant components.

state.title: SettingRow|setting.*row|bordered.*card

parts.text: Now I have all the settings-related components. Let me also search for any other settings components/pages that might exist.

Now I have all the information needed. Let me compile a thorough report on all three patterns across the settings components. Here are my findings: --- ## Pattern 1: "SettingRow" — Bordered Card with Title/Description Left, Control Right This pattern appears as a `flex items-start justify-between gap-4 rounded-lg border border-border p-4` container with text on the left and a Toggle/switch (or other control) on the right. ### File: `/home/diogenes/Projects/keating/web/src/components/KeatingUiSettingsTab.tsx` **Line 148-156** ```tsx
Show tool details

Show tool arguments and results inside chat messages. Compact status remains visible when this is off.

update({ showToolUi: checked })} />
``` **Line 158-166** ```tsx
Show raw error details

Display full error messages and response bodies in tool failures. When off, only a short summary is shown.

update({ showRawErrors: checked })} />
``` **Line 168-176** ```tsx
Open artifacts automatically

Open the artifact side panel when Keating creates a plan, map, animation, benchmark, or evolution.

update({ autoOpenArtifacts: checked })} />
``` **Line 215-226** ```tsx
Google web grounding

Automatically enable Gemini Google Search grounding when a Google key is available. This lets Google-backed chats use current web results and citations.

update({ googleGrounding: checked ? "auto" : "off" })} />
``` **Line 56-98** (variant with image upload buttons instead of toggle) ```tsx
...
Your profile image

Shown beside your chat messages on this device.

``` **Line 100-118** (variant with select dropdown on the right) ```tsx

Choose the default typeface for the app interface.

``` ### File: `/home/diogenes/Projects/keating/web/src/components/SpeechSettingsTab.tsx` **Line 137-145** ```tsx
Enable spoken responses

When on, Keating can call its voice tool to speak short learner-facing lines through the active provider.

persist({ enabled: checked })} />
``` **Line 269-277** ```tsx
Microphone (duplex providers)

When enabled, duplex providers like OpenAI Realtime may capture your microphone for back-and-forth voice. TTS-only providers ignore this.

persist({ microphoneEnabled: checked })} />
